---
title: "Reference"
---

Reference material for rig.

## Command-line reference

The full command-line reference is available from rig itself:

```sh
rig --help                 # overview of all commands
rig <subcommand> --help    # detailed help for a subcommand
```

See [Usage](../usage.qmd) for the list of commands and the platform-specific
`rig system` subcommands.

<!--
A generated, browsable CLI reference can be added here. See
`tools/gen-cli-reference.sh` (optional follow-up): it runs the built `rig`
binary, captures `--help` output for every command, strips ANSI escapes and
writes one page per command under `reference/cli/`.
-->

## Reference manuals

Additional reference manuals (e.g. rendered HTML or PDF documents) can be
linked or embedded here as they become available.
